tagline: A Sonoma County baking tradition since 1923
seoDescription: Costeaux French Bakery has crafted artisan breads, French pastry, and cafe fare in Sonoma County since 1923 — with a Healdsburg flagship, a Santa Rosa cafe, catering, and special-occasion cakes.
heroSubheading: A century-old Sonoma County bakery crafting artisan sourdough, French pastry, and cafe fare.
aboutBody: Costeaux French Bakery has been part of Sonoma County life since 1923, growing from a small Healdsburg bakery into a beloved institution known for hand-crafted sourdough, French breads, and pastry. Today the Seppi family carries that century-old tradition forward across the flagship Healdsburg bakery and cafe and a Santa Rosa location.

Beyond the bread case, Costeaux is a full cafe serving breakfast and lunch, a pastry and cake kitchen for weddings and celebrations, and a catering team for private events — all built on the same old-world craft the bakery was founded on.

services.title: Artisan Breads & Sourdough
services.description: Hand-shaped sourdough, baguettes, and country loaves baked fresh daily — the foundation of the bakery since 1923.

services.title: Pastry & Viennoiserie
services.description: Croissants, morning pastries, and French patisserie made from scratch each morning.

services.title: Cafe Breakfast & Lunch
services.description: A sit-down cafe menu of breakfast plates, sandwiches, salads, and WOLF coffee.

services.title: Custom Cakes
services.description: Wedding and special-occasion cakes designed and decorated to order.

services.title: Catering & Private Events
services.description: Full-service catering and private-event dining for gatherings across Sonoma County.

notes: Web-verified and authored for the ADA accessibility batch (hours, rating/credential, copy confirmed from the business site + Yelp/OpenTable/press). confirmed:true.
